reference: My fifteen-year-old daughter has severe learning problems and has petit mal seizures. She is taking six hundred milligrams of Epilim Chronosphere twice a day and has been taking this for about three months. She was on Epilim liquid before that. Her seizures have stopped, but she is losing her hair. Is this a temporary issue or permanent? What can I do to help her? Is there any shampoo that will stop it?
text: My 15-year-old daughter has severe learning problems and has petit mal seizures. She is taking 600 milligrams of Epilin Chronosphere twice a day and has been taking this for about three months. She was on Epilin liquid before that. Her seizures have stopped, but she is losing her hair. Is this a temporary issue or permanent? What can I do to help her? Is there any shampoo that will stop it?
